titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 1, no. 21: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 21. (A.R. No. of 2004-05.) PAḺAIYAŚĪVARAM, KANCHIPURAM TALUK, KANCHIPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west and south walls of jagati of the ruined Vaikuṇṭa-perumāḷ temple.

Records that the sabhā of Viṇṇapuram in Ūṟṟukkāṭṭu-kōṭṭam met in full strength at (the hall) Śīrkkuṭṭi-ambalam and passed a resolution relating to the performance of (the duties of) committees (vāriyam).

It was laid down that only those persons who were amenable both to the sabhā and kuḍumbu were to perform vāriyam. And while entering to discharge duties (of vāriyam) they should swear that they would not receive any levies such as ēri-āyam (levies on account of lake), sōṟumāṭṭu (feeding). āñārasam, brahmasvam except two kaḻañju of gold per year as expenses of vāriyam (vārpalam). It is also stated that these (members who were thus selected) should render accounts annually to the sabhā and declare on both the days of assuming and relinquishing their offices to that effect. They were also enjoined to do vāriyam only for two years. They should not do any alteration to the kuḍumbu. It is also laid down that they were entitled to take food from the villages on those days when they were on (tour from their native places) to attend (deliberations of the) committee (vāriyam).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakeśarivanmakku yāṇṭu 10 5 Āvatu nāḷ 10 2 Ūṟṟukkāṭṭuk koṭṭattu viṇṇapurattu peruṅkuṟi ssabhaiyom Innāḷāl cīrkkuṭṭi Ampalattile kūṭṭak kuṟaivaṟak kū
ṭi Iruntu Ippatiṉaintāvatu mutal vāriyañ ceyyum vyavastaiyāvatu Āvvav kuṭumpiṟkottārum sabhaikkottom vāriyañ cevārākavum vāriyam pukum potu satyañ ceytu vārpalam
Iru kaḻañcu poṉaṉṟi maṟṟu Epperppaṭṭitum Ēri Āyamum coṟumāṭṭum mutalāka maṟṟum ĀñjārasamumRead ājñārasamum brahmasvam Epperpaṭṭitum koḷḷomeṉṟu Āṇṭaṟuti ceytu sabhaiy
kku Okka kaṇakku kāṭṭi viṭunāḷum satyañ ceyvārākavum pukum potum satyañ cetu pukuvārākavum Ivvāriyam vārpalaṅ kuṭuttup pokku kāṭṭap peṟātārākavum vāriyam pukkarallātār

vasdharan toṟum vārpalaṅ koḷvatākavum Itaṉ mel vārpalameṉṟu koḷḷap peṟātārākavum vāriyam Iraṇṭāṇṭaṭuttu vāriyañ ceyyap peṟātārākavuṅ kuṭumpaḻikkap peṟātārākavum
kuṟai Avvav kuṭumpukku Ottārey vāriyañ ceyvāre vārpalamaṭṭi ceytu Icaiya kuṭumpumaṭṭi Okka Aṭaittuk koḷvatākavum maṉṟāṭa Ūr niṉṟum puṟappaṭṭa nāḷ mutal Ūr coṟu
Uṇpatākavum Ūrtravyaṅ koḷvomāka Epperppaṭṭa nyānya sahavāsañ ceyyap peṟātom Ākavum Ivyavastaiy Aṉṟeṉṟāre sabhaiyilum [ vyavastaiy] vāṟu Āka
vum satyañ ceyyātār vāriyañ satyañ ceytom peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyom .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 1, no. 21 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
